dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6720 IH: Fostering the Availability in Rural Markets of Home Loans Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. McDonald Rivet (for herself, Mr. Huizenga, and Mr. Riley of New York) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Agriculture

form.official-title: To amend the Farm Credit Act of 1971 to modify rural housing financing under that Act.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Fostering the Availability in Rural Markets of Home Loans Act of 2025 or the FARM Home Loans Act of 2025.
Section 1.11(b) of the Farm Credit Act of 1971 (12 U.S.C. 2019(b)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (2), by striking appurtenances and inserting appurtenances, including accessory dwelling units,; and
in paragraph (3), by striking 2,500 and inserting 10,000.
